title: Session cookie is only refreshed on GET requests
body: middleware.ts only re-signs and extends the session cookie when request.method === 'GET'. Users who stay active purely through server actions (POST) get silently logged out once the original 1-day JWT expires, even though they've been using the app the whole time.

title: Trial period length is hardcoded to 14 days
body: createCheckoutSession() sets subscription_data.trial_period_days to a hardcoded 14. We'd like to run a promotion with a 30-day trial without redeploying code -- can this be pulled from an env var or the price metadata instead?

title: Missing AUTH_SECRET crashes with an unhelpful error
body: If AUTH_SECRET isn't set in the environment, `new TextEncoder().encode(process.env.AUTH_SECRET)` throws a generic 'The "input" argument must be...' TypeError with no indication of what's actually wrong. Would be nice to fail fast at startup with a clear message.

title: How do I test the Stripe webhook route locally?
body: I'm trying to exercise app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts locally with the Stripe CLI but subscription updates never reach handleSubscriptionChange. Is there a documented way to forward events to localhost, or does this route expect a specific signing secret setup that isn't mentioned in the README?

title: Pricing page only shows the first page of Stripe products/prices
body: getStripePrices() and getStripeProducts() call stripe.prices.list/products.list without a limit or pagination, so once we passed Stripe's default page size the pricing page silently stopped showing our newer plans.
